channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overflowing bins, missed collections, rodent droppings now appearing, 21st June
item.description:
The communal bins at Humberton Close, E9 5TW are consistently overflowing and not being collected on schedule, leaving rubbish on the ground. I've now found rodent droppings, which I believe is directly linked. Please treat this as urgent due to health ris

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Castle Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding Needed, 21st June
item.description:
Weeding Needed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Acre Lane, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Foliage made path impassable, 21st June
item.description:
It’s now impossible to walk or run along the path through the wooded area next to Clissold Park Lakes. Foliage hasn’t been trimmed for so long that attempts to traverse this path result in getting stung by nettles. Is this path being abandoned?
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two large bags of rubbish and gas canister dumped, 21st June
item.description:
Two large rubbish sacks and large gas canister fly tipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): West Park, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Rosa thai, 21st June
item.description:
There is a huge hole there on the floor for a couple of days already.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 226, Iverson Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in Tormount road again, 21st June
item.description:
This has just been dumped on the corner of Tormount rd opposite number 68 & 66.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tormount Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily fly tipping of residential waste on overflowing public bin, 21st June
item.description:
This is happening every other day, and has been reported more times than I can count. It would really save you time and money if you were to find the person that’s doing this, and tell them to stop.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nevill Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stolen plaque dedicated to domestic abuse survivors on the boarder of Millfields Cricket Grounds, 21st June
item.description:
Someone has sadly stolen the brass plaque dedicated to domestic abuse survivors that was put in Millfields cricket pitch on Chatsworth Road when they planted trees.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees, 21st June
item.description:
School bus in and this location continuous striking the upper data of this double decker buses

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 119, Dulwich Road, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household rubbish dumped near tree, 21st June
item.description:
Rubbish being dumped for over 3 days- households just keep adding to it- with this heat its paradise for rats and foxes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree branches, 21st June
item.description:
Along this location trees continuous striking the upper decks of this double decker buses
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Nightingale Lane, Balham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Three kerb stones displaced by tree roots outside 37 Playfield Crescent SE22 8QS causing a hazard, 21st June
item.description:
Three large sharp concrete kerb stones immediately outside 37 Playfield Crescent have been displaced by moving tree roots. This is causing a trip hazard and also has already damaged car requiring total replacement tyres. This has gone on for at least a month. The hazard is increasing materially over time as the tree movement continues
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18-34, Playfield Crescent, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pothole on gower street right outside of gower mews, 21st June
item.description:
The pothole is loose and every time a car drives over it, it creates a very loud noise - the sound travels particularly well i to the mews, and it wakes many of the residents up at night. It also affects the hotel outside the mews. It would be great and much appreciated if it could be fixed please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Gower Mews, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Restricted visibility when exiting residential garage onto Sherard Road – request for traffic mirror assessment, 21st June
item.description:
The residential garage at 15 Sherard Road exits directly onto Sherard Road. Visibility of approaching traffic is restricted due to the layout of the garage exit and nearby street furniture. Drivers often need to edge forward into the carriageway before they can clearly see whether vehicles are approaching. I would be grateful if the Highways Team could assess the location and consider whether a traffic mirror or other suitable visibility improvement measure could be installed to improve safety for residents using the garage access. Photographs have been attached showing the restricted sight lines from the garage exit.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sherard Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree stump coming through pavement, 21st June
item.description:
As above. Can see other areas of the road with the same issues have been repaired. I fell and cut both my hands and knees with various bruises. Resulting in two visits to minor injuries to dress and bandage cuts. On Scotts Lane opposite Shortlands Grove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Scott's Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 18 Victoria Road, 21st June
item.description:
Bed base,mattress and headboard dumped on pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lynton Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Overhanging bush, 21st June
item.description:
It's overhanging so much that it renders the pavement unusable, there's also a fire hydrant beneath it that may soon be unaccessable.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 79, Kingswood Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafitti, 21st June
item.description:
This was done easily a few months ago now. Now there are 3 bits and it will get worse and be on the walls soon unless something is done asap. It is in Shad Thames in the underpass next to Tea Trade Wharf and the old Design museum.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Shad Thames, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: People are tripping on uneven paving blocks, 21st June
item.description:
This has been repaired by the council previously but it doesn't seem to have worked. Looks like weight of the car sinks the blocks under the wheels and raises them in between. It catches the underside of my car when leaving the driveway and I've heard of a few pedestrians tripping on the high blocks. Thanks, Conor Molloy (129)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Village Way, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of rubbish, makes area look uncared for., 21st June
item.description:
Lots of rubbish needs removing to help create pride in areas.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Silver Street, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
